name: Mixin

unions.name: Mixin
unions.comment: Similar to `Html.Attribute msg` but more flexible and reusable.

values.name: div
values.type: List.List (Mixin.Mixin msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: lift
values.comment:
Lift nodes to take `Mixin`s instead of `Attribute`s.

    import Html
    import Mixin

    view : Html msg
    view =
        Mixin.lift Html.form
            [ Mixin.class "foo"
            ]
            []
values.type: (List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg) -> List.List (Mixin.Mixin msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: node
values.type: String.String -> List.List (Mixin.Mixin msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: span
values.type: List.List (Mixin.Mixin msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg
